---
title: "Supervision and Mentoring"
---

* Since 2026: Mentor in the Cornelia Harte Mentoring Program, University of Cologne, mentoring Anna-Katrin Treier.

* Since 2025: Member of the Thesis supervision committee of *Yuting Li.* Université du Luxembourg. 

* Since 2024: Member of the Thesis supervision committee of *Federico Scalese.* Université du Luxembourg.
